content.en:
Chapter 3481 Ten Sided Crystals!

"As long as the Ultimate Extreme Masters don't attack me, I won't be in danger, why rush to attack the Ultimate Extreme Champions? I can continue to improve my strength, there's no need to be so anxious!"

Ye Tian explained lightly.

After hearing this, Zhangtian Jizun was speechless.

"Please, how about you let me go?"

Palm Heaven Supreme Venerable pleaded.

"No!" Ye Tian shook his head, "You are the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable, there is a chance to break through to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, I will not leave a great enemy for myself." So, you'd better die!"

Ye Tian made a move, and the ultimate arcane broke through the void and launched it with all his might.

Burst!

The body of the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable was pierced, and in an instant, the body turned into fragments and dissipated.

Seeing the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable being killed, the Guantian Supreme Venerable was extremely frightened.

He wanted to escape, but he knew very well that he couldn't even escape from the Heavenly Extreme Venerable, how could he, an Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Lord, escape?

"Wanfa Extreme Venerable, this matter has nothing to do with us, it was the Heavenly Extreme Venerable who forced us to come!" "Guantian Supreme Venerable still wanted to fool Ye Tian.

The other Ultimate Realm Lords also said the same, hoping that Ye Tian would let them go.

However, in response to them was Ye Tian's casual blow.

In an instant, the bodies of the Heavenly Viewing Extreme Venerable and many Ultimate Realm Lords were shattered and wiped out by Ye Tian.

Followed by.

He shuttled through the Ultimate Void with one hand, crossed the dimension, and descended to the Heavenly Sacred Mountain.

Rumble!!!!!

Under one blow, the Guantian Holy Mountain was destroyed.

Whew!!

Soon, the Ultimate Realm Lord came to the side of the Guantian Holy Mountain, which was the force where the Guantian Extreme Venerable was located.

In this era, even if the Guantian Extreme Venerable is not as good as the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable, it is also the second most powerful existence, and the Guantian Sacred Mountain is undoubtedly an extremely safe place, but now that it has been destroyed, they are naturally very curious.

"There is a high probability that it is the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable.!"

"I sensed that the Heaven Viewing Extreme Venerable and other Ultimate Realm Lords had left the Heavenly Viewing Holy Mountain, and the direction they went was probably the Human Race, so it was the Heaven Viewing Extreme Venerable and the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable colliding. Therefore, there is a high probability that the Guantian Extreme Venerable has been defeated, and even the Guantian Sacred Mountain has been destroyed by the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable!"

After that, they went to find out what was going on, and it was.

And.

There is also news that came out, that is, the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable appeared, after all, after the appearance of the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable, many Ultimate Realm Lords of Guantian Holy Mountain knew about it, and then some Ultimate Realm Lords spread the news, thinking that the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable would dominate the entire Sea of Temperature.

But now, Zhangtian Jizun was also killed by Ye Tian.

All of a sudden, all the powerhouses thought that Ye Tian was the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, otherwise, how could they kill the legendary Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable, who was already the Ultimate Extreme Venerable?

All of a sudden, countless forces were extremely respectful to Ye Tian and did not dare to be disrespectful in the slightest.

......

Multidimensional territory.

Mitian Jizun also knew that Guantian Jizun and Zhangtian Jizun were killed by Ye Tian, and even Guantian Holy Mountain was destroyed by Ye Tian.

He was undoubtedly very happy, but he also had to admit that Ye Tian's strength was too strong.

"The Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable should not be the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, it seems that the rumors are wrong, otherwise the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable will not be able to kill the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable!"

Mi Tian Jizun said with a smile.

Originally, he was still a little worried about Guantian Jizun, but now he is relieved, Guantian Jizun is dead, and he can be regarded as a great revenge.

Gradually, the matter of the Heavenly Venerable was forgotten by the people as the years passed, and the Sea of Dimensions entered a relatively peaceful period again.

And at the moment.

Ye Tian was researching a treasure, and it was a ten-sided crystal obtained from the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable after killing the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable.

His attack power is so terrifying, he killed the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable, and many of the treasures of the Palm Heaven Extreme Zun have turned into ashes, but these ten crystals have been well preserved, which shows that it is not simple!

Now, he has refined and confessed the ten crystals.

After years of research, he found that these ten-sided crystals were very magical, and after the ultimate will entered here, nothing in the outside world could affect him.

These ten-sided crystals can shield all powers, even the origin power of the ultimate rule.

"The Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable should have failed to impact the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, and the Ultimate Will hid in it, and then it was resurrected recently. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

This also explains why the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable was born recently, because he was really dead before, but the remaining ultimate will survived with the help of this ten-sided crystal, and it can also repair the ultimate will and its own origin, and then create some secret means to resurrect, which is normal.

These ten-sided crystals are really amazing, with it, some Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Masters can survive even if they fall.

More importantly, these ten-sided crystals contain a terrifying power, which is very valuable for research, and it should be on the same level as the Ultimate Rule Origin.

Ye Tian was going to study this treasure more to see if he could research something, and after studying for a period of time, he would go to the ultimate supreme realm.

In this way, the long years passed slowly.

In the blink of an eye, countless years of the Ultimate Era have passed.

And Ye Tian created a secret technique that helped him a lot through this ten-sided (Demo Zhao) crystal.

This secret technique is called the Ten Faces Ultimate Void Technique, and this secret technique needs to be cast with the help of these ten crystals, which can seal the Ultimate Void and prevent the snooping of the Ultimate Supreme Venerable.

He was going to create an area that would be carved out with the ten-sided Ultimate Void Technique and the ten-sided crystals, allowing a replica body to stay there.

In this way, even the Ultimate Extreme Masters would not be able to find out the location of this replica body, and even if all his other replica bodies fell, he would still be able to survive.

In short, with this ten-sided Ultimate Void Technique, he didn't have to worry about the threat of the Ultimate Extreme Venerable.

It's a pity that Zhangtian Jizun didn't create this secret technique, if he had this secret technique and made another clone, I really couldn't kill him!"

Ye Tian muttered.
